EKOS Called Me
 
Careers
Careers

EKOS is one of Canada’s leading supplier of applied research on national issues, and is always looking for professionals with a proven track record of expertise in the field. Individuals have the opportunity to develop their skills and knowledge in an exciting and fast-paced environment where they work with senior decision-makers on national, provincial, and corporate issues.

We offer opportunities for people with the right mix of motivation and self-confidence to join our team of talented, skilled, and diverse professionals. As an industry leader in the field of research, EKOS welcomes applicants from a variety of disciplines. If you are looking for a dynamic career geared toward designing practical solutions for Canada’s top decision-makers, we invite you to take a closer look at the EKOS advantage.

Research Professionals
